column1: # Custom partition table — 64 KB NVS (vs Arduino default 20 KB).
# The default 20 KB partition fragments and refuses 12 KB blob writes
# 8 MB flash budget. nvs starts at 0x9000 (same as default).
# IMPORTANT: When introducing this partition table or changing it
# `pio run -t erase` BEFORE the next `pio run -t upload`
# bootloader reads the new table while the firmware is still at the old
